# API Index - m7-js-lib-ui

[README](../../README.md) -> [API Index](./INDEX.md) -> [Modules Index](./modules/INDEX.md)

This API reference is organized as a 3-level split:

1. Top-level API index (`docs/api/INDEX.md`)
2. Module index (`docs/api/modules/INDEX.md`)
3. Per-module references (`docs/api/modules/*.md`)

## Primary Entry Points

- `src/index.js` - re-exports installer
- `src/install.js` - canonical installer
- contract: [M7_JS_LIB_UI_API_CONTRACT.md](./M7_JS_LIB_UI_API_CONTRACT.md)
